title: Interface settings
subtitle: Customize app language and global preferences.
orgNoneHint: Create an organization to invite team members and share workspaces.
orgCreateAnotherHint: Create an additional organization without leaving the current one.
orgSlugConflict: This identifier is already taken — choose another
orgInviteNotFound: No account found for this email address.
orgInviteAlreadyMember: This person is already a member.
orgDeleteConfirmHint: Workspaces owned by this organization will be preserved and reassigned to your account.
desktopNotificationsHint: Notify when an AI run finishes and the conversation is not visible.
desktopNotificationsThresholdHint: 0 = notify as soon as the run finishes.
agentCliStatusMissingWarning: The selected provider is not installed locally.
mcpServerHint: Leave empty to use the local server.
agentsSubtitle: Install or update Nakiros commands/agents in workspace repositories.
noRepoConfigured: No repository configured in this workspace.
noNakirosConfig: This repository has no _nakiros/workspace.yaml pointer (installation may be incomplete).
globalAgentsSubtitle: Install Nakiros commands in ~/.claude/commands, ~/.codex/prompts, and ~/.cursor/commands — available in all repos without per-repo installation.
projectSubtitle: Configure MCPs, LLM documentation and agents for this workspace.
mcpSubtitle: MCP servers available to agents in this workspace.
docsSubtitle: Files or URLs provided to agents as context (llms.txt, CLAUDE.md, library docs…).
workspaceOwnerSignInHint: Sign in to choose whether this workspace belongs to you or to an organization.
workspaceOwnerPersonalHint: The workspace will belong to your personal account.
workspaceOwnerOrganizationHint: The workspace will belong to the selected organization and be visible to its members.
projectOwnershipSubtitle: Transfer a personal workspace to one of your organizations.
projectOwnershipSignInHint: Sign in to transfer this workspace to an organization.
projectOwnershipNoOrganizations: Create or join an organization before transferring this workspace.
projectOwnershipTransferHint: This action is only available while the workspace is still personal. Once transferred, it becomes personal again only if the owning organization is deleted.
projectOwnershipOrgLockedHint: Project settings do not support moving an organization workspace back to personal scope or to another organization. Delete the organization to reassign its workspaces to your personal account.
projectOwnershipConfirmHint: After this change, workspace access is managed under the organization scope.
docLangHint: Language used by agents for comments, commits and generated documentation.
gitSubtitle: Repository configuration and branch pattern for agents.
pmSubtitle: Connect this workspace to a PM tool to sync tickets and time tracking.
providerCredentialsSubtitle: Manage reusable GitHub and GitLab credentials. Secrets are submitted once and stay masked afterwards.
providerCredentialsWorkspaceSubtitle: Attach reusable provider credentials to this workspace and select the active one per provider.
workspaceMembersSubtitle: Assign a workspace role to each organization member without changing organization-wide membership.
workspaceMembersSignInHint: Sign in to review and manage workspace access.
workspaceMembersManagerOnly: Only workspace owners or admins can manage access in this workspace.
workspaceMembersPersonalWorkspace: This is a personal workspace, so there is no organization member directory to manage here.
workspaceMembersEmpty: No organization members are available for this workspace yet.
workspaceMembersSaveError: Failed to update the workspace member.
workspaceMembersRemoveError: Failed to remove the workspace member.
workspaceMemberActiveHint: This person currently has access to the workspace.
workspaceMemberInactiveHint: This organization member is visible but not yet added to the workspace.
providerCredentialBaseUrlHintGithub: Optional. Use this only for GitHub Enterprise.
providerCredentialSecretReplacePlacehold: Leave empty to keep the current secret
providerCredentialSecretCreateHint: The raw secret is sent once to the Worker, encrypted, and never shown again.
providerCredentialSecretEditHint: Leave empty to keep the current encrypted secret.
providerCredentialEmptySubtitle: Create reusable credentials once, then attach them to any workspace that needs them.
providerCredentialValidationBaseUrl: A base URL is required for this provider.
workspaceProviderCredentialProviderHint: Available credentials for {{provider}} on this workspace.
workspaceProviderCredentialEmptySubtitle: Attach an existing credential or create a new one from this workspace.
workspaceProviderCredentialPmToolHint: This selects the primary PM provider for later product features. Credential bindings remain reusable across providers.
workspaceProviderCredentialLoadError: Failed to load workspace credential bindings.
workspaceProviderCredentialBindError: Failed to attach the credential to this workspace.
workspaceProviderCredentialDefaultError: Failed to update the active credential.
workspaceProviderCredentialDetachError: Failed to detach the credential from this workspace.
agentAISubtitle: Default provider and detected CLIs are grouped in one section.
mcpNakirosSubtitle: Configure the MCP URL used to connect workspaces and agents.
agentNakirosSubtitle: Updates and catalog of Nakiros agents and workflows.
incompatibleUpdateDesc: This version requires a Nakiros app update (v{{version}}).
agentsUpToDate: Agents and workflows are up to date.
catalogSubtitle: Available commands to orchestrate Nakiros agents and workflows.
deleteWorkspaceConfirm: ⚠ This action is irreversible. Confirm deletion across {{count}} repo(s)?
deleteWorkspaceDesc: Permanently removes the repo-scoped Nakiros files from every repo in this workspace:
orgSubtitle: Manage your organization, members and invitations.
orgNotConnectedHint: Sign in to create or join an organization.
